title: consilience-engine: a domain-agnostic multi-lens consilience engine for gene sets
description: A keyless, reproducible engine that, for any set of gene groups, pulls multiple public data modalities (InterPro structure, Human Protein Atlas cell-type expression, STRING interaction, GO-BP process), builds a gene-gene similarity graph per modality, and quantifies which modality is required to recognise each component. Operationalises the lens-map principle: cell types are revealed by expression, molecular families by structure, functional modules by interaction; structure and expression are orthogonal. Validated across the nervous and immune systems.
